project.name: extension-hub
project.description: Multi-agent communication hub — AI agents (Antigravity, Codex via MCP) collaborate on code review via event-driven architecture
project.status: v1.0.0 Released — Active development (debate, handoff, multi-agent review)

features.name: Phase 1: Core Hub
features.description: HubServer, Session, EventStore, WebSocket streaming, REST API, Dashboard UI — 172/172 tests

features.name: Phase 2.03: MCP Adapter + Codex Review
features.description: MCP bridge adapter for Codex CLI, session-scoped review via Hub server API

features.name: Phase 2.04: Session Label + Evaluate/Rerun
features.description: Human-readable session labels, evaluate→rerun feedback chain, auto-label on retry, createRetry forwards all config

features.name: Phase 2A: Agent-to-Agent Collaboration
features.description: Collaboration state machine, debate orchestration, consensus engine. Committed: feat(collab): Add Phase 2A agent-to-agent collaboration layer

features.name: Multi-Agent Debate Review
features.description: Claude Code + Codex review song song, cross-evaluate, debate N rounds, consensus merge + final report cho Antigravity. 8 debate findings fixed (P0-P3).
phases: Sub-phase B: Debate engine (DONE — 7/8 findings fixed, 1 deferred)

features.name: Claude Code Adapter
features.description: ClaudeCodeAdapter + parsing module. 24 tests pass. Registered in adapter-registry. Live review verified.

features.name: Phase 3: MCP Server
features.description: Hub exposes itself as MCP tools via stdio transport. Tools: hub_create_review, hub_get_status, hub_get_findings, hub_evaluate_findings, hub_rerun_review, hub_list_sessions, plus 5 collab tools + debate tools.

features.name: Debate Timeout Tuning
features.description: Increased Claude Code agent timeout to match review needs (reviews take 2-5 min). Prevents premature timeout during debates.

features.name: Handoff Artifact Cleanup
features.description: Only latest.* files retained in handoff artifacts. Past history auto-cleaned during session finalization.

features.name: Live Debate Runs
features.description: Ran live debates with Codex + Claude Code agents on extension-hub.js. Cross-evaluation working. Sessions stored in tmp/live-debate-data-*/sessions/*.json

features.name: Live Debug Demo
features.description: live-debug-demo.js — spawns both CLIs, streams to dashboard, writes .feedback inbox

features.name: Plan Consultation
features.description: consult-plan.js — asks both CLIs for plan opinions via Hub server

features.name: Code Annotation Viewer (Phase 04)
features.description: phase-04-code-annotation.md — file viewer with syntax highlighting, IDE links, XSS safety. Reviewed through Codex rounds.

decisions.reason: Codex: 45s/20s/90s, Claude: 300s/60s/600s (increased after timeout bugs — reviews take 2-5 min)
Codex critique round 3 — client clocks unreliable
Prevent agents from modifying source during review

decisions.decision: Session label field for human-readable tracking
decisions.reason: UUID session IDs impossible to track. Label shows 'Review Phase-04 Round 1' in dropdown.

decisions.decision: Evaluate→rerun API chain for review feedback
decisions.reason: Each round was independent, Codex never received agree/disagree. Now: POST /evaluate → POST /rerun.
Old createRetry only forwarded prompt. Now forwards agentId, reviewOptions, snapshotPath, round, label.
debate-state.js enum only has idle/reviewing/evaluating/debating/done/failed. Custom states break state machine.
Memory leak: if runDebate throws, sessionId stays in activeSessions forever. finally{} ensures cleanup.
hub_start_debate acknowledged success before verifying adapters exist. Now hasAdapter() check is synchronous.

decisions.decision: Debate gating on ALL REST collab routes
decisions.reason: MCP tools had debate gating but REST routes didn't. blockIfDebateActive() returns 409 DEBATE_ACTIVE.
Dead-end: expired turns always went to awaiting_assignment. Now recovers to correct waiting state for the role.

decisions.decision: Only keep latest.* in handoff artifacts
decisions.reason: Past handoff history is noise — only latest matters for next session. Cleanup integrated into session finalization.

decisions.decision: Claude Code timeout increased for debates
decisions.reason: Default timeout too short — debates involve deep analysis that takes 2-5 minutes. Increased to prevent false failures.

gotchas: Check combinedBytes (stdout+stderr) not just stdoutBytes for pass/fail
Codex '9router' provider needs explicit OPENAI_API_KEY env var when spawned from Node.js
Claude Code -p mode with --output-format json returns structured_output field, not result text
Claude Code exit code null is normal — check is_error:false instead
raw_output broadcast should NOT truncate (was 1200 char limit, caused data loss)
Duplicate method definitions in JS class: later definition silently overrides earlier one at runtime
Rerun with rebuttals context can cause Codex to return 0 findings (too aggressive context)
PowerShell ConvertTo-Json truncates nested objects. Use -Depth 3+ for complex request bodies.
Claude Code CLI re-added as ClaudeCodeAdapter for multi-agent review
path.join + startsWith can be tricked by sibling dirs sharing prefix. Fix: startsWith(dir + path.sep)
http.Server.listen(port) without host binds to 0.0.0.0. Always specify '127.0.0.1'.
removeAllListeners('error') removes ALL error handlers. Use named function + removeListener(fn).
existsSync returns true for directories. Always check statSync().isFile() before createReadStream.
Codex MCP adapter can stall — Hub watchdog detects via idleMs > 45s. Fix: restart Hub server.
PowerShell `exit` in inline code kills entire shell. Use `break` + `$result` variable instead.

gotchas.issue: createEvent takes 4 positional args (sessionId, agentId, eventType, payload) NOT options object
createFinding requires summary/evidence/file (NOT title/description/category). Auto-generates id and dedupe_key.
listAdapters() returns string[] of agent IDs, not adapter objects
e2e-test.js imported 'ClaudeAdapter' from 'claude-adapter.js' — file renamed to 'claude-code-adapter.js' with class 'ClaudeCodeAdapter'
server.js runDebate catch used invalid state 'debate_failed' — must use 'failed' per debate-state.js enum
REST apiAdvanceSession didn't pass turnToken to advanceCollabState — turn-sensitive actions silently failed
Live debates may timeout if Claude Code agent takes too long — increased timeout to 600s hard limit

conventions: Agent feedback in .feedback/, run logs in .agents/runs/
File splitting: warn >200 LOC, must split >300 LOC
Full combined output saved to tmp/consult-*-combined.txt
Handoff artifacts: only latest.* retained, history auto-cleaned

patterns.name: Claude Code CLI Adapter Pattern
patterns.description: ClaudeCodeAdapter extends BaseAdapter for Claude Code CLI. Uses -p --output-format stream-json --verbose. 5-strategy finding extraction.

patterns.name: Claude Code stdout is plain text, not NDJSON
patterns.description: Despite using --output-format stream-json, Claude Code CLI sends result text directly to stdout — NOT wrapped in NDJSON. Strategy 4 (parse allOutput directly) is the one that works in practice.

patterns.name: Debate Orchestration Flow
patterns.description: hub_start_debate → validate adapters → runDebate(sessionId, agents[]) → cross-evaluate → consensus check → final report. States: idle→reviewing→evaluating→debating→done/failed.

patterns.name: Collaboration State Machine
patterns.description: Session collab: reviewer→responder→decider roles. Turn-based claiming with TTL. advance actions: review_complete, request_response, request_rerun, resolve, close, release_turn.
